questions.context_sentence: 79-year-old Hiroshi competed at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics.
questions.cn: 79岁的博津宽参加了2020年东京奥运会。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：com（共同）+ pete（追求/寻找） -> 共同追求，即“竞争；参加比赛”。
questions.prompt:
请选择英文单词或短语的正确中文意思：
“compete”

questions.context_sentence: "It offers a photo chance and people love it," said Crawford.
questions.cn: 克劳福德说：“它提供了一个拍照的机会，人们非常喜欢它。”
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ch + ance（名词后缀） -> 把握这次“机会；机遇”。
questions.prompt:
请选择单词或短语的正确英文翻译：
“n. 机会；机遇”

questions.context_sentence: "It offers a photo chance and people love it," said Crawford.
questions.cn: 克劳福德说：“它提供了一个拍照的机会，人们非常喜欢它。”
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ch + ance（名词后缀） -> 把握这次“机会；机遇”。
questions.prompt:
请选择英文单词或短语的正确中文意思：
“chance”

questions.context_sentence: "But now it's under control," he added.
questions.cn: “但现在一切都处于控制之下，”他补充道。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：under（在……之下）+ control（控制） -> 处于控制之下。
questions.prompt:
请选择英文单词或短语的正确中文意思：
“under control”

questions.context_sentence: Condori thought of the idea after seeing his classmates throw away many old toys every year.
questions.cn: 在看到他的同学们每年扔掉许多旧玩具后，孔多里想出了这个主意。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：think（想）+ of（关于） -> 想出；构思出。
questions.prompt:
请选择英文单词或短语的正确中文意思：
“think of”

questions.context_sentence: A student has saved £3,000 on travel costs by staying in people's homes as a pet sitter while traveling across Europe.
questions.cn: 一名学生在环游欧洲期间，通过在人们家中当宠物保姆，节省了3000英镑的旅费。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s + ave（大街） -> 走在街上要“节省；节约”钱财。
questions.prompt:
请选择单词或短语的正确英文翻译：
“v. 节省；节约”

questions.context_sentence: Some interesting facts about the Summer Olympics
questions.cn: 关于夏季奥运会的一些有趣事实
questions.hint: 联想记忆：f + act（行动/做） -> 做过的事情就是“事实；真相”。
questions.prompt: Some interesting ____ about the Summer Olympics (提示: n. 事实；真相)

questions.context_sentence: They have a pair of big round eyes that make them look awake at all times.
questions.cn: 它们有一双大而圆的眼睛，这使它们看起来总是醒着的。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：at（在）+ all（所有）+ times（时间/时刻） -> 在所有时刻，即“随时；总是”。
questions.prompt: They have a pair of big round eyes that make them look awake ____. (提示: 随时；总是)

questions.context_sentence: A student has saved £3,000 on travel costs by staying in people's homes as a pet sitter while traveling across Europe.

questions.context_sentence: The app allows people to stay in homes around the world for free as long as they look after the owner's pet.
questions.cn: 该应用程序允许人们免费入住世界各地的住宅，只要他们照顾屋主的宠物。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：for（为了）+ free（免费/自由） -> 免费地。

“for free”

questions.context_sentence: And they are also mentioned in the saying, "As wise as an owl."

questions.context_sentence: The app allows people to stay in homes around the world for free as long as they look after the owner's pet.

questions.context_sentence: Owls are birds that feed on small creatures, like mice, bats and frogs.
